findings.message: Docstring claims 'owner_email stored' but the actual implementation at line 46 calls create_item(session, payload.name) without passing owner_email, so it is not stored. This is a documentation-code mismatch.
findings.suggestion: Either (1) update the docstring to clarify that owner_email is intentionally not persisted, (2) modify create_item() to accept and store owner_email, or (3) remove owner_email from ItemCreate if it's not needed for the current functionality.
